name: credicobranza-monorepo
description: Sistema de Gestion de Prestamos y Cobranza - Fullstack

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev:backend:local: cd backend && DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5433 npm run dev
scripts.docker:db: cd backend && docker compose up db -d
scripts.docker:dev: cd backend && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
